title: demorchis uraiensis
intro: Demorchis uraiensis, also known as Uraie's orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Sri Lanka. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Demorchis uraiensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparation of this plant is often found in the form of a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
